proposed_temporal_allocation: 4 pairs per target year (Rule A eligible); Compact event-enriched accessibility pilot: 4 Rule-A pairs per target year (2 positive where available + 2 negative); deliberately oversamples positive distress events relative to Rule A pool prevalence (~8%).
